options.name: -area
options.description: List of points for box end coordinates.

options.name: -coreToBoundary
options.description: any instance lying within the distance of coreToBoundary (in microns) to the trim box will be discarded. Default: is 2 times the pitch of second routing layer

options.name: -dir
options.description: <output_dir_to_save_trimmed_design> Directory in which data related to trimmed-design will get saved

options.name: -encryptName
options.description: To encrypt names of instances and nets in design while saving trimmmed design

options.name: -nets
options.description: To specify nets to be completely enclosed by the specified shape by taking union of shape with net-boxes

options.name: -polygon
options.description: List of points to represent polygon.

options.name: -selectedRouteBlk
options.description: Selected routing blockages, which will be used to infer box or polygon
